lessons.title: The Greek Gift Sacrifice (Bxh7+)
lessons.description: Execute the famous Greek Gift sacrifice to attack the castled King.

steps.instruction: The conditions for the Greek Gift are met! Black King on g8, our Bc4 can reach h7, we have Queen and Knight ready. Sacrifice with Bxh7+!

feedback.correct: BOOM! The Greek Gift sacrifice! Black must take with Kxh7.
feedback.incorrect: Play Bxh7+! The famous Greek Gift sacrifice - all conditions are met!

steps.instruction: Black took the Bishop. Now jump Ng5+! Attack the exposed King with a discovered check!

feedback.correct: The Knight joins the attack with check! The King is exposed.
feedback.incorrect: Play Ng5+ - the Knight attacks with check, opening the Queen's path to h5.

steps.instruction: The King retreats. Now bring in the Queen! Play Qh5 threatening Qh7# and Qxf7#!

feedback.correct: Devastating! Qh5 threatens Qh7# and Qxf7#. Black can't defend both threats!
feedback.incorrect: Play Qh5 - the Queen joins the attack with multiple mate threats!

lessons.successMessage: You've executed the Greek Gift sacrifice! Pattern: Bxh7+ Kxh7 Ng5+ Kg8 Qh5 with a winning attack!
hints: Requirements: King on g8, Bishop reaches h7, Queen+Knight ready
After Bxh7+ Kxh7, the Knight must jump to g5 with check
The Queen comes to h5 threatening Qh7# and Qxf7#

lessons.title: The IQP d4-d5 Break
lessons.description: Find the right moment to push d4-d5 in an Isolated Queen Pawn position.

steps.instruction: You have an IQP on d4. Black's pieces are slightly uncoordinated. The e6 pawn is weak. Find the pawn break!

feedback.correct: YES! d5! This pawn break opens lines. After exd5, your pieces become extremely active on the open files and diagonals. The IQP's power unleashed!
feedback.incorrect: The key IQP break is d4-d5! Push d5 to open the position while Black is uncoordinated.

lessons.successMessage: The d4-d5 break is the IQP's secret weapon. Time it when your pieces are active and the opponent is uncoordinated!
hints: The key IQP break is d4-d5
Push when your pieces support the break
After d5, the position opens up for your active pieces

lessons.title: Execute the Minority Attack
lessons.description: Learn how to execute the Minority Attack with b4-b5 to create weaknesses.

steps.instruction: You have fewer queenside pawns (a2, b2) vs Black's (a7, b7, c6). Start the minority attack! Play a4 to prepare b4-b5.

feedback.correct: Preparing b4-b5! The minority attack begins!
feedback.incorrect: Play a4 to prepare the b4-b5 advance.

steps.instruction: Now push b4! The second step of the minority attack.

feedback.correct: b4! One more step - next comes b5 attacking c6!
feedback.incorrect: Play b4 - advance the pawn to prepare b5.

steps.instruction: Now the decisive push! Play b5 to attack the c6 pawn and create permanent weaknesses!

feedback.correct: b5! After bxc6 bxc6, Black has a permanently weak backward pawn on c6 and a weak c5 square!
feedback.incorrect: Push b5! Attack c6 to create a permanent weakness.

lessons.successMessage: You've executed the Minority Attack! a4-b4-b5 creates permanent weaknesses in the enemy camp.
hints: The minority attack aims to create a backward pawn on c6
Prepare with a4, then b4, then b5
After bxc6, Black has a permanent weakness

lessons.title: Convert Material Advantage
lessons.description: Practice converting a material advantage by simplifying to a winning endgame.

steps.instruction: You are up a Bishop for nothing (extra piece). Black offers a Queen trade. Accept it! Trade Queens to simplify when ahead in material.

feedback.correct: Smart! Capture the Knight to win more material. When you're ahead, trade pieces to simplify!
feedback.incorrect: Capture the Knight! When ahead in material, trade pieces to simplify. Try Nxe4 or Bxe4.

steps.instruction: Black took your d-pawn. Now trade Queens! Play Qxd4 to head into a winning endgame.

feedback.correct: Perfect conversion technique! Trade Queens when ahead in material. The endgame is easily winning.
feedback.incorrect: Play Qxd4 - trade Queens! In the endgame, your extra piece will be decisive.

lessons.successMessage: You've converted a material advantage! Rule: When ahead, trade pieces (not pawns) and head for the endgame.
hints: When ahead in material: trade pieces!
Trading Queens removes opponent's attacking potential
In the endgame, your extra piece will easily win
